# Praxis Public

Generated: 2026-06-25T19:41:58.434766+00:00
Source: commit `9375315` on `main`

Praxis is the Control Alt workflow ledger.
Praxis Public is the public-readable orientation layer — not the operational ledger.
Private Praxis retains implementation and deployment authority.

## Object kinds

- **Signal**: Low-authority captured idea or observation preserved for later triage
- **Campaign**: Coordinated multi-lane effort spanning agents, repos, and decision checkpoints
- **Beacon**: Current navigation, state, and evidence map for a Campaign or Strand
- **Strand**: A continuing line of attention kept open toward an outcome; may be active, paused, or completed
- **Fiber**: Small identifiable work unit that advances a parent Strand
- **Directive**: Instruction object: authorized action, explicit boundaries, validation expectations, stop conditions
- **Readout**: Recorded result from a bounded evaluation run of an agent, provider, workflow, or related system
- **Probe**: Reusable check — observation-first pass/fail evidence
- **Protocol**: Repeatable procedure composed of steps an operator or agent can run
- **Doctrine**: Reusable guidance that outlives a single task
- **Imprint**: Durable rationale or decision trace

## Active campaigns

- **Campaign: Make the Control Alt Development workflow more flexible (cursor is dead)**
  The Control Alt development workflow must stop depending on Cursor as the single implementation agent or workflow host.

## Active strands

- **Axiom Owner Workbench Strand** — Axiom / Praxis / Owner workflow
  This Strand tracks a continuing line of attention around making Axiom usable as an owner-facing operating surface for Praxis-backed Control Alt work.
- **Praxis Public Solution** — Praxis / Public access / Control Alt workflow
  Create a public-readable Praxis layer that improves Control Alt workflow continuity, agent review, and Mara/ChatGPT access without exposing private implementation repos, private handoffs, runtime reports, LAN/device details, or unfinished product code.

## Active fibers (recently updated)

- **Praxis Public Functional MVP** — Praxis / Public access / Agent workflow replacement
  Move Praxis Public from seed / proof-of-comprehension into a functional MVP that can support real Control Alt workflow. The MVP must reduce chat-memory drift, private-connector luck, and operator re-explanation.
- **Praxis Public Generated Publisher v0** — Praxis / Public access / Generated context
  Make Praxis Public a generated, public-safe projection of private Praxis rather than a manually maintained documentation repo.

## Authority boundary

- Reading: allowed for orientation and context.
- Modifying private repos: NOT authorized from Public Praxis.
- Deploying services: NOT authorized from Public Praxis.
- Implementation: requires a private Directive from private Praxis.

## Agent load order

1. README.md
2. PUBLIC_PRIVATE_BOUNDARY.md
3. CURRENT_OPERATING_MODEL.md
4. CURRENT_WORK.md
5. prompts/agent-startup.md

## Full object index

### Campaigns (1)

- Campaign: Make the Control Alt Development workflow more flexible (cursor is dead) [active]
  The Control Alt development workflow must stop depending on Cursor as the single implementation agent or workflow host.

### Strands (5)

- Axiom Owner Workbench Strand [active]
  This Strand tracks a continuing line of attention around making Axiom usable as an owner-facing operating surface for Praxis-backed Control Alt work.
- Human names, hidden machinery [complete]
- Praxis Provider Model Evaluation [paused]
  Provide the bounded thread for Praxis-owned provider/model evaluation work inside the Control Alt Development Workflow Flexibility Campaign.
- Praxis Public Solution [active]
  Create a public-readable Praxis layer that improves Control Alt workflow continuity, agent review, and Mara/ChatGPT access without exposing private implementation repos, private handoffs, runtime reports, LAN/device details, or unfinished product code.
- Public Praxis Seed — Compatibility Locator [superseded]

### Beacons (2)

- Control Alt Development Workflow Flexibility Beacon [active]
- Praxis Evaluation Harness Need Beacon [active]

### Fibers (51)

- Axiom Owner Workbench Scope v0 Fiber [complete]
  Scope the owner-facing Axiom operating surface before any implementation. The result should define what Axiom should show and prepare for the owner-operator so that Praxis becomes easier to use, not another ledger the operator must manually audit.
- Axiom Page Template Audit v0 [complete]
  Audit Axiom page types and define a v0 page-template taxonomy before designing or implementing any one-off action page.
- Axiom Praxis Campaign Cockpit v0 [complete]
  Define the Axiom/Praxis cockpit lane: Axiom should help the operator continue creating Control Alt systems using Praxis truth, without bypassing Praxis authority or collapsing planned work into a general operational surface.
- Axiom Project/Repo Registry Consumption (Design) [complete]
  Design — not implement — how a future, separately-authorized Axiom PR would consume `doctrine-control-alt-project-repo-registry-v1` to replace the hardcoded `_RAW_ALLOWLIST` constant in `backend/praxis_execution_action_target_repo_allowlist.py`, while preserving v0's exact…

  Design — not implement — a v1 first-class Control Alt project/repo registry for Praxis: a canonical, queryable mapping from stable project identifiers (`praxis`, `axiom`, `standards`, `lcard`, ...) to their real repo identity, replacing the need for any future consumer to…
- Operator Identity & Merge Authorization Cleanup (Governance) [complete]
  Record a small governance cleanup: an agent-held memory note used stale, ambiguous operator-identity wording during the PR #40 merge flow, and state the going-forward rule plainly so it does not recur. Design/cleanup only. No authorization behavior changes in code.
- Praxis Codex Comment Fixups [complete]
  Address the verified Codex automated-review comments from PRs #6, #9, and #10 before starting `fiber-praxis-local-worker-post-apply-ergonomics`, so review debt doesn't compound while local-worker surface area keeps growing.
- Praxis Eval Comparison Rollup [complete]
  Add a small comparison rollup for Praxis eval artifacts.
- Praxis Eval DeepSeek Run Action Readiness [complete]
  Prepare the already-selected DeepSeek V4 Flash live eval to become a correctly-shaped runnable action before spending a provider call.
- Praxis Eval DeepSeek V4 Flash Focused Live Run [complete]
  Run one bounded, suite-scoped live evaluation against `accounts/fireworks/models/deepseek-v4-flash`, then record artifact paths, usage accounting, JSON-format behavior, and rollup inclusion evidence.
- Praxis Eval Live Model Preflight [complete]
  Bake provider-native model discovery and model preflight into live `praxis-eval` runs so Praxis does not begin a provider-backed evaluation with an unvalidated or guessed model identifier.
- Praxis Eval Model Family Filtering [complete]
  Add a small family/pattern exclusion mechanism to `praxis-eval` auto model selection.
- Praxis Eval Quality Scenario Pack [active]
  Add a small quality scenario pack to Praxis evals.
- Praxis Eval Quality Scenarios [active]
  Add an opt-in quality scenario pack to `praxis-eval`.
- Praxis Eval Rollup Coverage Reconciliation [complete]
  Create a bounded implementation target to reconcile Praxis eval rollup coverage so future provider/model comparisons use a trustworthy artifact inventory.
- Praxis Eval Runner Prototype [deferred]
  Create a small, bounded implementation lane for a `praxis-eval-runner` prototype.
- Praxis Eval Usage Efficiency [active]
  Track token usage as part of model viability.
- Praxis Exec Direct API Prototype Fiber [active]
  Develop `praxis-exec` as a Praxis-owned local implementation harness that can use direct provider APIs as engines without replacing Cursor with another paid coding-agent wrapper.
- Praxis Execution Action Apply Gate v0 [complete]
  Add opt-in approval verification to `praxis-local-worker apply`, using the append-only approval event log from PR #21 — `apply --require-approval` refuses unless the latest recorded decision is a still-matching approval.
- Praxis Execution Action Approval Events v0 [complete]
  Add a small, append-only way to record human approve/reject decisions for a saved local-worker Execution Action artifact, without making `apply` autonomous or having it consume approval automatically.
- Praxis Execution Action Axiom Artifact List — Design v0 [complete]
  Design v0 artifact discovery/listing for the Axiom Praxis Execution Action card, now that the single-artifact live source (`ctrl-alt-axiom#145`, merged) lets Axiom load a known id or `--last` but gives no way to discover what ids exist.

  Implement v0 artifact discovery/listing for the Axiom Praxis Execution Action card, per the recommendation in `fiber-praxis-execution-action-axiom-artifact-list-design-v0` (Praxis PR #30).

- Praxis Execution Action Model v0 [complete]
  Move one level above the now-validated `praxis-local-worker` CLI loop and define how a Praxis execution should be represented inside Praxis/Axiom as a first-class operator-facing action, so executions can eventually be tracked, reviewed, resumed, and surfaced in UI.
- Praxis Execution Action State File v0 [complete]
  Add a v0 durable Execution Action state file for a saved local-worker artifact, composing the structured outputs from `doctor --json`, `inspect --json`, and `diff --json` — the bridge from the validated CLI workflow to future Praxis/Axiom Execution Action consumption.
- Praxis Execution Action v0 Milestone Checkpoint [complete]
  Record a milestone checkpoint for the Praxis local-worker Execution Action v0 chain after PRs #17–#23: what changed, what is now considered v0-stable, what is explicitly not done yet, and the recommended next Fiber. Paperwork/evidence only.
- Praxis Execution Workflow v0 Docs [complete]
  Write canonical v0 documentation for the `praxis-local-worker` execution workflow, now that PRs #6–#14 have made the `run → doctor → inspect → diff → apply` loop coherent and the operator no longer has to reconstruct it from Readouts alone.
- Praxis Local Worker Artifact Doctor [complete]
  Add a read-only `doctor` command to `tools/praxis-exec/praxis-local-worker` that summarizes whether a saved Praxis execution artifact is usable and what the operator can safely do next, without requiring the operator to manually open several artifact files to answer that…
- Praxis Local Worker Command [active]
  Replace fragile manual shell-packet workflows with a deterministic local worker command.
- Praxis Local Worker Doctor JSON Output [complete]
  Add structured JSON output to `praxis-local-worker doctor` so Praxis/Axiom can populate the v0 Execution Action model (`docs/praxis-execution-action-model-v0.md`, PR #17) without parsing human `key=value` text.
- Praxis Local Worker Ergonomics Hardening [complete]
  Remove the remaining operator friction from the local worker loop.
- Praxis Local Worker Normalized Artifact Consumption [complete]
  Make `tools/praxis-exec/praxis-local-worker` consume the normalized/proposed artifacts `praxis_exec.py` writes after PR #7, instead of depending on raw `model-output.txt` parsing whenever better artifacts are already present.
- Praxis Local Worker Post-Apply Ergonomics [complete]
  Improve local-worker operator ergonomics after an artifact has already been applied, closing the two non-blocking gaps the PR #11 dogfood pass found.
- Praxis Local Worker Structured Review Outputs [complete]
  Add structured JSON output to `praxis-local-worker inspect` and `diff`, now that `doctor --json` (PR #18) exists, so Praxis/Axiom has structured proposed-content and diff evidence to go with `doctor`'s structured diagnosis — before implementing Execution Actions or Axiom UI.
- Praxis Object Canon Refresh [complete]
  Codify the next Praxis object-model improvements needed for the Public Praxis work and the broader workflow-flexibility campaign.
- Praxis Provider Candidate Comparison Readout [complete]
  Create a dedicated provider/model candidate comparison Readout, separating provider/model candidate evidence from harness validation evidence.
- Praxis Provider Model Evaluation Checkpoint [complete]
  Create a practical checkpoint Readout for the provider/model evaluation Strand after the DeepSeek V4 Flash focused live run.
- Praxis Provider Output Contract Hardening [complete]
  Make `tools/praxis-exec/praxis_exec.py` more reliable at producing, validating, diagnosing, and (where safe) recovering replacement JSON from a provider response, without making any specific model a permanent dependency.
- Praxis Public Functional MVP [active]
  Move Praxis Public from seed / proof-of-comprehension into a functional MVP that can support real Control Alt workflow. The MVP must reduce chat-memory drift, private-connector luck, and operator re-explanation.
- Praxis Public Generated Publisher v0 [active]
  Make Praxis Public a generated, public-safe projection of private Praxis rather than a manually maintained documentation repo.
- Praxis Self-Hosted Model Eval Pack [active]
  Make Praxis capable of running bounded AI model evaluation and implementation loops itself.
- Public Praxis Seed [complete]
- Terminal SSH Command Packet Boundary [complete]
  Capture and close the small Praxis work unit created by the operator correction that large bash-style terminal SSH packets should not be used as the normal Control Alt / Praxis execution interface.

  The one authorized provider-backed live eval attempt against `accounts/fireworks/models/deepseek-v4-flash` is complete.

  Live model preflight v0 has been implemented and validated locally on dev-ubuntu.
- Praxis Eval Model Family Filtering v0 Readout [complete]
  Model family/pattern filtering v0 has been implemented and validated locally on dev-ubuntu.
- Praxis Eval Quality Scenario Pack v0 Readout [pending-local-validation]
  Quality scenario pack v0 has been implemented and is pending local validation on dev-ubuntu.
- Praxis Eval Quality Scenarios v0 Readout [complete]
  The quality scenario pack has been implemented as a companion runner and validated against the latest known DeepSeek challenger run.
- Praxis Eval Rollup Coverage Reconciliation v0 Readout [complete]
  `tools/praxis-exec/praxis-eval-report` now produces deterministic coverage accounting: every discovered `summary.json` is either an included run or an excluded entry with an explicit reason.
- Praxis Eval Usage Efficiency v0 Readout [complete]
  Token usage has been inspected across recent Praxis eval artifacts.
- Praxis Exec Direct API Real Implementation Readout [complete]
  `praxis-exec` successfully used the Fireworks direct API to implement a bounded real change in `AptlyClever/praxis-public` without Cursor, Claude Code, Codex CLI, or another paid coding-agent wrapper.
- Praxis Execution Action Apply Gate v0 Readout [complete]
  Implemented and validated `apply --require-approval` on branch `mara/execution-action-apply-gate-v0`: an opt-in gate that refuses to mutate the target repo unless the latest entry in `<artifact_dir>/execution-action-events.jsonl` is an approval that still matches the artifact's…
- Praxis Execution Action Approval Events v0 Readout [complete]
  Implemented and validated `praxis-local-worker approve` on branch `mara/execution-action-approval-events-v0`: an append-only human approve/reject decision recorder for saved local-worker artifacts. Verified PR #20 is on `main` and `action-state --help` exists before starting.
- Praxis Execution Action Axiom Artifact List — Design v0 Readout [complete]
- Praxis Execution Action Axiom Artifact List v0 Readout [complete]
- Praxis Execution Action Axiom Card Contract v0 Readout [complete]
- Praxis Execution Action Axiom Card Live Artifact Source — Design v0 Readout [complete]
- Praxis Execution Action Axiom Card Live Artifact Source v0 Readout [complete]
- Praxis Execution Action Axiom Card v0 Readout [complete]
- Praxis Execution Action Axiom Page Surface v0 Readout [complete]
- Praxis Execution Action Axiom Read Model v0 Readout [complete]
- Praxis Execution Action Axiom Runtime Roots v0 Readout [complete]
- Praxis Execution Action Axiom Target Repo Access — Design Readout [complete]
- Praxis Execution Action Full Loop Dogfood v0 Readout [complete]
  Ran the full `run -> doctor --json -> inspect --json -> diff --json -> action-state -> approve -> apply --require-approval -> confirmation` chain end-to-end against a real live Fireworks call, then two negative smoke checks on a second fixture.
- Praxis Execution Action Model v0 Readout [complete]
  Wrote `docs/praxis-execution-action-model-v0.md` on branch `mara/praxis-execution-action-model-v0`: a v0 architecture/design model for representing one `praxis-local-worker` execution as a durable, operator-facing Praxis/Axiom Execution Action.
- Praxis Execution Action State File v0 Readout [complete]
  Implemented and validated `praxis-local-worker action-state` on branch `mara/execution-action-state-file-v0`: a v0 durable Execution Action state snapshot composing `doctor_diagnosis`, `inspect_view`, and `diff_view` directly in Python.
- Praxis Execution Action v0 Milestone Checkpoint Readout [complete]
- Praxis Execution Workflow v0 Docs v0 Readout [complete]
  Wrote `docs/praxis-execution-workflow-v0.md` as the canonical v0 runbook for the `praxis-local-worker` execution workflow, on branch `mara/praxis-execution-workflow-v0-docs`. Documentation only — no code changed.
- Praxis Execution Workflow v0 Dogfood Readout [complete]
  Validate that the newly merged runbook (`docs/praxis-execution-workflow-v0.md`, PR #15) can actually guide a real operator through the local-worker loop, by following it as written rather than recalling the flow from chat context.
- Praxis Live Provider Contract Validation 2026-06-22 Readout [complete]
- Praxis Local Worker Artifact Doctor v0 Readout [complete]
  Implemented and validated v0 of a read-only `doctor` command for `tools/praxis-exec/praxis-local-worker` on branch `mara/local-worker-artifact-doctor-v0`.
- Praxis Local Worker Command v0 Readout [complete]
  `tools/praxis-exec/praxis-local-worker` was implemented and validated against local patch-helper artifacts.
- Praxis Local Worker Doctor JSON Output v0 Readout [complete]
  Implemented and validated `praxis-local-worker doctor --json` on branch `mara/local-worker-doctor-json-output-v0`.
- Praxis Local Worker Ergonomics Hardening v0 Readout [complete]
  Implemented and validated the v0 ergonomics hardening pass for the Praxis local worker helper on branch `mara/local-worker-ergonomics-v0`.
- Praxis Local Worker Full Loop Dogfood v0 Readout [complete]
- Praxis Local Worker Normalized Artifact Consumption v0 Readout [complete]
  Implemented and validated v0 normalized-artifact consumption for `tools/praxis-exec/praxis-local-worker` on branch `mara/local-worker-normalized-artifact-consumption-v0`.
- Praxis Local Worker Post-Apply Ergonomics v0 Readout [complete]
  Implemented and validated both post-apply ergonomics fixes from the PR #11 dogfood Readout on branch `mara/local-worker-post-apply-ergonomics-v0`: `inspect`'s repo-resolution fallback, and `doctor`'s already-applied vs. stale-dirty distinction.
- Praxis Local Worker Structured Review Outputs v0 Readout [complete]
  Implemented and validated `praxis-local-worker inspect --json` and `diff --json` on branch `mara/local-worker-structured-review-outputs-v0`, mirroring `doctor`'s existing compute-once-print-twice pattern from PR #18.
- Praxis Native Model Retrieval Fireworks Discovery v0 Readout [complete]
  The provider model discovery helper has been validated locally on dev-ubuntu.
- Praxis Provider Candidate Comparison v0 Readout [complete]
  Record a dedicated provider/model candidate comparison, separate from harness validation, per `directive-praxis-provider-candidate-comparison-readout-v0` (Praxis #53).
- Praxis Provider Model Evaluation Checkpoint v0 Readout [complete]
- Praxis Provider Output Contract Hardening v0 Readout [complete]
  Implemented and locally validated v0 replacement-JSON contract hardening for `tools/praxis-exec/praxis_exec.py` on branch `mara/provider-output-contract-hardening-v0`.
- Praxis Public Functional MVP v0 [complete]
  Praxis Public functional MVP work was started as an actual Praxis chain under the existing `strand-praxis-public-solution` Strand.
- Praxis Public Generated Publisher v0 — Readout [complete]
  The first local deterministic Praxis Public publisher (`tools/praxis-public-publish/publish.py`) was implemented, run in check mode, and run in write mode against a temporary output directory.
- Praxis Public Publisher v1 Summaries Readout [complete]
  Praxis Public Publisher v1 implementation is complete. All 8 required scopes passed validation. A public-branch write to the local praxis-public checkout succeeded on branch `generated/praxis-public-refresh-20260625-192555`.
- Praxis Self-Hosted Model Eval Pack v0 Readout [complete]
  The v0 self-hosted Praxis model eval pack implementation has been added to the private Praxis repository and validated locally on dev-ubuntu.
- Terminal SSH Command Packet Boundary [complete]
  Record the codification of the operator correction that large bash-style command packets are not acceptable as the normal interface for terminal SSH workflows.

### Probes (8)

- Probe: Arcade Lighting Room Map v0 [collecting]
  Create a rough physical and control map of the Arcade lighting situation before selecting products.
- Containers use real storage [draft]
  Identify containers whose bind mounts point under storage-backed paths and verify that those paths resolve to the intended mounted filesystem.
- Praxis Evaluation Harness Need [promoted]
- Praxis Project Identity Association [complete]
- Storage before Docker [draft]
- The host can find the world [draft]
  Confirm the host can resolve external names before blaming individual containers for DNS-related failures.
- The map still makes sense [draft]
  Confirm the generated host-wide Docker Compose master file is syntactically valid before using it for broad compose operations.
- What is still complaining [draft]
  Produce a concise health summary for Docker containers after a recovery event without immediately mutating services.

### Protocols (7)

- Protocol: Arcade Hail overlay — live deploy path [canonical]
- Protocol: Away Team Hail overlay — travel stick deploy [canonical]
  Canonical deploy and maintenance path for the **Away Team** travel Google TV (ONN 4K / `wayne`, Android 14). Reachable over **Tailscale** from homelab; not on household LAN.
- Axiom Emergency Work Session [active]
  Define the safe shape for unplanned operational work through Axiom once an Operator Console exists.
- Axiom Local Web Redeploy [active]
- Protocol: Homelab Docker — safe ordered prune [canonical]
- Protocol: Platform Test Hail — upsert and smoke send [canonical]
  Canonical **living Test hail** for the Hail platform: a stable record id that is **rebuilt from current Axiom defaults** on every upsert so smoke sends never use a stale frozen package.
- Public Praxis Functional MVP Clean-Room Tests [active]
  Run the required Public Praxis Functional MVP tests in the current real workflow environment: Praxis is still operated through a guarded CLI, so the protocol must create explicit public-only input bundles and feed those bundles to the AI surface without exposing private Praxis…

### Doctrines (18)

- Doctrine: Axiom Execution Action target repo allowlist v0 [active]
  Canonical **v0 allowlist** of stable Control Alt project repos Axiom may be permitted to mount and validate against for Praxis Execution Action review. This is a fixed, hand-maintained, three-entry list — not a registry, not a service, not yet implemented anywhere.
- Axiom Hail Forge — product doctrine [canonical]
  Lock the accepted split between **`#/axiom/hails`** (operate one Hail) and **`#/axiom/hails/forge`** (manage reusable **Glyphs** and **Effects**).
- Axiom Hails edit studio layout [canonical]
  Lock the accepted **inline edit studio** layout for `#/axiom/hails` after Studio C–E implementation passes.
- Axiom Hails — page template bindings v001 [canonical]
  Index **both** Hails surfaces — `#/axiom/hails` (operate a Hail) and `#/axiom/hails/forge` (author Glyphs and Effects) — to their **page template IDs**, **shared authoring footprint**, and **implementation bindings**.
- Axiom Hails page visual object picker design lock [canonical]
  This doctrine locks the accepted visual and product composition for the Axiom Hails page after repeated failed loops through generic admin, Composer-only, gallery-only, overbuilt inspector, and copy-only compliance passes.
- Axiom judgment-scale plot surface — product doctrine [canonical]
  Lock the **plot surface** pattern: validate authored marks at **judgment scales inside Axiom** at a **LAN-visible URL** — not via SVG/HTML files on dev-ubuntu that the operator cannot see from their workstation.
- Doctrine: Axiom Operator Console Boundary [active]
  Axiom may eventually expose practical operator-console capabilities for unplanned inspection, triage, protocol execution, and emergency remediation, but only as declared, scoped, visible, logged operator action.
- Doctrine: Collective Beta versioning [active]
  A **Collective Beta** is a coordinated cut across every runtime consumer of a composed payload — not a single-repo release and not a deploy by itself.
- Doctrine: Control Alt project/repo registry v1 [active]
  The first-class, **Praxis-owned** registry of Control Alt projects: a stable `project_id` mapped to a real, verified git repo identity, replacing the need for any future consumer to hand-roll its own hardcoded list the way the Axiom v0 target-repo allowlist already had to.
- Control Alt Readable Naming Principle
- Doctrine: Google TV fleet registry [active]
  Canonical **inventory and endpoint registry** for household Google TV sticks that participate in the Hail platform. One YAML file is the operator SoT; generated JSON/JS maps feed Axiom delivery and LCARD overlay POST targets.
- Hail effects — transporter first [approved]
- Doctrine: Hail Glyph essence [active]
  A **Glyph** is the **identity object** of a Hail — one **stylized subject** the household recognizes in the Grid before message copy and effect choreography finish the beat.
- Doctrine: Hail Glyph Hero style [active]
  **Glyph Hero style** is how ctrl-alt marks are **drawn** (L2) and **routed** by subject class (L3 kinds, packs, instances).
- Doctrine: Hail platform naming [active]
  Canonical names for the **Hail platform** — the integrated authoring, distribution, and playback system within ctrl-alt. Use this doctrine for product language, contract versioning rules, and cross-repo verification naming.
- Doctrine: Hails Collective Beta 2.0 [active]
- Praxis Evaluation Usage Accounting [active]
  Define how Praxis evaluation runs should record model/provider usage, token consumption, cost evidence, session identifiers, and accounting uncertainty.
- Terminal SSH Command Packet Boundary [active]
  Define the standing boundary for command packets intended to be pasted into an interactive terminal SSH session, especially dev-ubuntu maintenance, Axiom deploy/smoke work, and Praxis-guided local execution.

### Imprints (24)

- Beacon, Readout, Fiber, and Directive Object Canon [canonical]
- Control Alt Object Naming — Convergence Decisions (v0) [canonical]
- Cursor Replacement Is Not a Paid Agent Wrapper [active]
- Imprint: Hail cohesion — Alert Level kits [active]
  A **Hail** is one household moment. Operators assemble it in the **loadout studio**; the TV plays one **transmit**. **Cohesion** means Glyph Hero, Effects Sidekick, Message Sidekick, and **presentation** read as one unit — not four unrelated picks.
- Hail effects renderer capabilities and limits [approved]
- Imprint: Hail Glyph agent — stop signal not honored (2026-06-20) [locked]
  Operator repeatedly asked probing questions, requested recommendations, and gave **pointed corrections** including **stop doing the approach that is not working**.
- Imprint: Hail Glyph Hero — compliance execution failure (2026-06-19) [locked]
  On **2026-06-19**, after the operator directed an agent to write **`imprint-hail-glyph-hero-compliance`** (golden path, operator §4, no upsert-as-proof), the **same agent session** treated a **new narrow structural verifier** as ship criteria, registered slot/icon glyphs, and…
- Imprint: Hail Glyph Hero — compliance (execution lock) [locked]
  **Glyph Hero** essence is defined in **`doctrine-hail-glyph-essence`** (Praxis). This imprint does **not** redefine it. It locks **how agents and scripts may claim compliance** so pytest, upsert scripts, and “fixture shipped” cannot substitute for the product path.
- Imprint: Hail Glyph plot gate — semantics not enforced (2026-06-20) [locked]
  **`verify:glyph-plot` / `glyph_plot_verify.py`** passes **`custom-combadge-plot`** while operator **P1 subject read fails**. The gate certifies **geometry heuristics and hero metrics**, not the product requirement in `doctrine-hail-glyph-essence` (“one subject in a phrase”).
- Imprint: Hail Glyph plot proof — validation conflated with representation (2026-06-20) [locked]
  Campaign **`pso-20260620-axiom-glyph-plot-proof`** promised a **plot layer** (“draw before deliver”). Implementation shipped **validation infrastructure** (API, Glyph Plot UI, plot gate script, static fixture) that **reuses the same display substrate** as Forge and Hails.
- Imprint: Hail Glyph — representation layer gap (documented vs shipped) [locked]
- Imprint: Hail hero-centric effect field [active]
  **Effects Sidekick** VFX scale to the **Glyph Hero** and the **Hail moment** — not to an arbitrary small box derived from glyph-focus height alone. VFX may **extend past drawn glyph art** (card ink, emblem paths) while remaining inside the **Grid safe zone**.
- Imprint: Hail loadout color — by-element scope [active]
  Operators pick one **COLOR** loadout (`visual.palette_id`). On Hails compose and Hail Forge, that choice **over-applies** when it tints Grid scrim, message plate/text, or effect beams from the same control.
- Imprint: Hail package — sidekick transition boundary [active]
  A **completed Hail Package** is a **frozen composed artifact** — geometry, hero content, and **resolved sidekick manifests** at Save. It must **not** embed transition choreography as operator-editable instructions.
- Imprint: Hail priority levels — Green / Yellow / Red [active]
  **Hail Priority** is the operator-facing **intent band** for a hail: how much attention it should command on the TV and in the household rhythm.
- Imprint: Hail work chain — deviation lock [locked]
  Agents **must not** pick Hail platform work from stale campaigns, parallel tracks, or “high impact” heuristics when **`scheme-hail-platform-work-chain`** exists. Implement **only** the step marked **`active`**, unless the operator explicitly deviates using a phrase below.
- Imprint: Hails Collective Beta — package & delivery v002 [locked]
- Imprint: Hails multi-surface — ambient / room extension (deferred) [active]
- Imprint: Hails preview — Tier B visual parity required [locked]
- Praxis Object Model Migration — Planning Decisions (v0) [canonical]
- Praxis Object Type Translation Map [canonical]
  Provide a human-readable translation map for current Praxis object types.
- Relay Replaces Handoff Transport [canonical]
- Signal Object Canon [canonical]
- The names we use [draft]
